section_name: Vendor to Provide Customer Support Services
chapter_title: Denial of Renewal of License for Failure to Appear
text:
(a) A vendor must establish and maintain customer support services as directed by the department, including a toll-free telephone service line to answer and resolve questions from persons who are denied renewal of a driver’s license under this chapter.

(b) The vendor shall comply with terms, policies, and rules adopted by the department to administer this chapter.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 706. Denial of Renewal of License for Failure to Appear
##### § 706.009 — Vendor to Provide Customer Support Services

(a) A vendor must establish and maintain customer support services as directed by the department, including a toll-free telephone service line to answer and resolve questions from persons who are denied renewal of a driver’s license under this chapter.

(b) The vendor shall comply with terms, policies, and rules adopted by the department to administer this chapter.

*Added by Acts 1997, 75th Leg., ch. 165, Sec. 30.161(a), eff. Sept. 1, 1997.*

subsections.label: a
subsections.text: A vendor must establish and maintain customer support services as directed by the department, including a toll-free telephone service line to answer and resolve questions from persons who are denied renewal of a driver’s license under this chapter.

subsections.label: b
subsections.text: The vendor shall comply with terms, policies, and rules adopted by the department to administer this chapter.

history.raw: Added by Acts 1997, 75th Leg., ch. 165, Sec. 30.161(a), eff. Sept. 1, 1997.
